⚖️
NEUTRAL REGIME
Dalio macro: watch · The machine is balanced — no strong directional bias in the current environment. VIX 24.9 — elevated…
Graham 15%Buffett 25%Dalio 20%Lynch 20%Simons 20%
👤 Persona Reference
Benjamin Graham
Value · Margin of Safety
Philosophy Buy only when price is significantly below intrinsic value — margin of safety above all else.
Metrics P/E ratio · Price-to-book · Debt/Equity · Current ratio
🟢 Buy when P/E ≤ 10, P/B ≤ 1.0, D/E < 0.5, current ratio ≥ 2, earnings stable 10y
🔴 Avoid when P/E > 20, P/B > 2.0, D/E ≥ 0.5, current ratio < 1.5, or erratic earnings
Warren Buffett
Quality · Moat
Philosophy A wonderful company at a fair price — durable moat and capital returns matter more than cheapness.
Metrics Return on equity · Profit margin · Free cash flow · Moat evidence
🟢 Buy when ROE > 15% consistently, margins above peers, clear moat, FCF positive
🔴 Avoid when ROE < 10%, margins thin or shrinking, no competitive advantage, weak or negative FCF
Ray Dalio
Macro · Regime
Philosophy Understand the machine — the debt/economic cycle determines which assets win.
Metrics 10Y yield trend · VIX · Credit spreads (TLT) · Inflation proxies
🟢 Risk-on Easing rates, low/falling VIX, early-to-mid debt cycle → boosts Lynch & Simons weights
🔴 Risk-off Tightening, rising VIX, late cycle → boosts Graham & Buffett; deleveraging vetoes BUY calls
Peter Lynch
Growth · Discovery
Philosophy Find growth before the institutions do — understand the business, trust the earnings trajectory.
Metrics PEG ratio · Earnings growth rate · Institutional ownership % · Insider activity
🟢 Buy when PEG ≤ 1.0, earnings growing 15–30% YoY, low institutional ownership, insiders buying
🔴 Avoid when PEG > 2.0, earnings growth stalling or negative, fully institutionally owned, insiders selling
Jim Simons
Quant · Pattern
Philosophy The market has patterns — find them with math, not narrative. No opinions on the business.
Metrics RSI · MACD crossover · 50d/200d MA cross · 30/60/90d momentum
🟢 Buy when RSI 40–65 trending up, bullish MACD crossover, golden cross (50d > 200d), positive momentum
🔴 Avoid when RSI > 75 (overbought) or < 25 with no reversal, bearish MACD, death cross, negative momentum
